closed_world.value: Small town of El Paso, Colorado with apartment building and police station
closed_world.quote: I looked out the window as the small town of El Paso, Colorado passed by my eyes.

investigator.value: Ms. Moravia, a young woman being questioned by police but not yet established as detective
investigator.quote: After minutes of pleading and begging, I finally agreed to come back with them to the station.

social_world.value: Working-class apartment building with informal hierarchies - building secretary Mosey provides keys and social connection outside official rules
social_world.quote: he was supposed to stop giving me replacement keys around six, but he still grinned

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist has history of supernatural encounters as child - learned about death and violence from ghosts, creating psychological vulnerability
investigator_wound.quote: I learned about murders and death from an offed mother of two named Martha
